seoTitle: Terrick Terrick vs Tesbury — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Terrick Terrick and Tesbury. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Terrick Terrick vs Tesbury: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Terrick Terrick and Tesbury.
heading: Terrick Terrick vs Tesbury — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Terrick Terrick, Victoria and Tesbury, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Terrick Terrick has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Tesbury (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Terrick Terrick or Tesbury safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Terrick Terrick has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Tesbury scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Terrick Terrick scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Tesbury scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Terrick Terrick or Tesbury?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Terrick Terrick has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
